title: After the Kikuka Sho: Bouncing Back

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower comes in first. Mihono Bourbon
praises her win and the two promise to have a
rematch in their senior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the same time, Matikanetannhauser is full of
regret after losing. All the same, she still shows
everyone that she's as optimistic as ever for next
time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After returning to campus, Matikanetannhauser
sets the spring Tenno Sho as her next major goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to run another long-distance race
between now and spring, so we set the Diamond
Stakes as her next race!
